name: GOLFTEC Englewood
about: GOLFTEC is a technology-driven golf instruction and training studio focused on data-driven improvement. The company utilizes advanced tools like OPTIMOTION motion measurement technology, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide detailed swing feedback. Services include private golf lessons, club fitting, and practice memberships, all designed with a structured, coaching-led approach to help golfers of all levels enhance their skills and performance on the course.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven lessons using advanced motion capture and launch monitor technology
Comprehensive club fitting services for optimized equipment performance
Structured practice plans with coach-designed guidance for measurable improvement
Access to professional coaching with personalized game plans and feedback

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitors mentioned for club and ball tracking
SKYTRAK products referenced in privacy policy

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, GOLFTEC provides clubs for lessons and fittings, though you can bring your own if preferred.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are permitted, as the facility is focused on instruction and practice services.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulation take?
faq.answer: Standard simulation times vary depending on the group size and pace, but typically 18 holes take 1.5-2 hours per bay.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and welcomes young golfers with age-appropriate instruction and technology.
